VIVIDHA, WAKEFIT
Methodology & Column Key
Methodology: "Full Alignment" strictly requires 20 DMA > 50 DMA > 200 DMA. "Risk Profile" is determined dynamically: High Risk if ATR% > 4% or Beta > 1.5; Low Risk if ATR% < 2% and Beta < 1.0; Medium otherwise.
RS Rtg: 1–99 relative strength rank vs universe
Full Alignment: 20 DMA > 50 DMA > 200 DMA
Returns: Historical returns (1W/1M/3M/1Yr)
Dist 52W H/L: % Distance from 52W High (Red) and 52W Low (Green)
Trend Score: Momentum score out of 3 (🟢🟢🟢)
MACD: Crossover indicator (▲ Bull, ▼ Bear)
Avg Vol Spike: Volume spike vs 50-day average
ATR %: Average True Range / LTP * 100
📊 Overview 🚀 Momentum 📈 Oscillators 🛡️ Risk 〰️ Moving Avg 🔓 All Columns Pullback Clear
